mapper.sql: select id, order_no, currency_id, item_id, chain_tag, item_name, user_id, tg_user_id, channel_id, shareholder_id, order_type, amount, bonus_amount, exchange_type, trade_img, remark, address, create_time, create_by, lower_subtype from t_order_person
mapper.insert:
insert into t_order_person
order_no, currency_id, item_id, chain_tag, item_name, user_id, tg_user_id, channel_id, shareholder_id, order_type, amount, bonus_amount, exchange_type, trade_img, remark, address, create_time, create_by, lower_subtype,
#{orderNo}, #{currencyId}, #{itemId}, #{chainTag}, #{itemName}, #{userId}, #{tgUserId}, #{channelId}, #{shareholderId}, #{orderType}, #{amount}, #{bonusAmount}, #{exchangeType}, #{tradeImg}, #{remark}, #{address}, #{createTime}, #{createBy}, #{lowerSubtype},
mapper.delete:
delete from t_order_person where id in
#{id}
